# JILBIT

> Jesus Is Lord, Believe It. — A Christian ministry site for biblical teaching, outreach, and gospel-centered service.

## Site
- URL: https://jilbit.com

## Mission
JILBIT exists to proclaim the lordship of Jesus Christ through biblical teaching, discipleship, outreach, and practical service.

## Key pages
- / — Home; ministry overview and calls to action
- /about — Ministry story and why the message matters
- /blog — Articles, teaching, and stories
- /blog/why-jamaica — Jamaica outreach story
- /blog/first-steps-in-faith — Faith foundations
- /blog/jamaica-preparation-guide — Outreach preparation
- /outreach — Summer Jamaica Outreach and missions
- /donate — Giving (one-time and recurring)
- /order — Ministry resources / orders where applicable
- /projects — Ministry projects
- /trending — Featured or trending content
- /terms — Terms and Conditions
- /privacy — Privacy Policy

## Contact
- Email: info@jilbit.com

## Technical
- Sitemap: https://jilbit.com/sitemap.xml
- robots.txt: https://jilbit.com/robots.txt
